title: JLO (disambiguation) - Wikipedia
body: Look up JLo or J-Lo in Wiktionary, the free dictionary. J.Lo is a nickname for Jennifer Lopez (born 1969), American singer and actress. JLO may also refer to: People [ edit ] Jason Lo or J Lo (born 1975), Malaysian musician João Lourenço , president of Angola Justin Longmuir , nicknamed JLo, Australian footballer Other uses [ edit ] J.Lo (album) , an album by Jennifer Lopez Judgment of Line Orientation Junge Landsmannschaft Ostdeutschland Juvenile Liaison Officer J.Lo, a character in The True Meaning of Smekday See also [ edit ] Jennifer Lopez (disambiguation) Topics referred to by the same term This disambiguation page lists articles associated with the title JLO . If an internal link incorrectly led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article.
